title: primula × cultorum
intro: Primula × cultorum, also known as polyanthus or hybrid primrose, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family, Primulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Primula × cultorum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used as a natural remedy in the form of powder or capsules.
